mapper.sql: id, url, storage_path, original_name, mime_type, file_size, width, height, md5, created_by, created_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO images (url, storage_path, original_name, mime_type, file_size, width, height, md5, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{url}, #{storagePath}, #{originalName}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{width}, #{height}, #{md5}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM images WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM images WHERE md5 = #{md5} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM images WHERE url = #{url} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM images WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM images WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT i.id, i.url, i.storage_path, i.original_name, i.mime_type, i.file_size, i.width, i.height, i.md5, i.created_by, i.created_at, i.deleted_at FROM images i LEFT JOIN image_usages iu ON i.id = iu.image_id WHERE i.created_by = #{createdBy} AND i.deleted_at IS NULL AND iu.id IS NULL ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM images i LEFT JOIN image_usages iu ON i.id = iu.image_id WHERE i.created_by = #{createdBy} AND i.deleted_at IS NULL AND iu.id IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE images SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
